Banner.Description: I am a Full-Stack Developer with over 1.2 years of experience building scalable web applications and enterprise solutions. On the frontend, I specialize in creating responsive, user-friendly interfaces using Angular and React. On the backend, I develop secure and high-performance systems with Node.js and Express.js
AboutMe.Title: About me
AboutMe.Paragraphs: With over 1.2 years of experience as a Full-Stack Developer, I have worked across the full development lifecycle, from writing unit tests and setting up CI pipelines to building backend systems with Express.js and MongoDB. I have also led teams, fostering collaboration and aligning goals with empathy and clear communication.

I specialize in creating scalable solutions by optimizing performance, standardizing patterns, and delivering clean, maintainable code. My expertise spans frontend frameworks like Angular, React, and Next.js , as well as backend technologies such as Node.js, Express.js, complemented by experience with NoSQL databases.
Experience.Title: Experience

Experience.Jobs.Title: Software Developer
Description: Developed and maintaining a web-based application using Angular, Node.js, and MongoDB, resulting in improved user experience and increased performance.
Built a real-time chat application using WebSockets and Node.js, increasing communication and collaboration among team members.
Translated the whole application to arabic language using ngx-translate library and i18n, improving accessibility for Arabic-speaking users.
Integrated the chat bot into application Application for document conversation using OpenAI API, enhancing user engagement and support.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Software Developer
Description: Angular Developer with experience working on client-side assignments for Fino Payments Bank, specializing in building scalable and high-performance web applications.
Skilled in developing dynamic user interfaces using Angular,optimizing application performance, and implementing efficient component-based architectures.
Experienced in integrating APIs, improving application speed, and ensuring seamless user experience. Adept at collaborating with cross-functional teams.
to deliver reliable fintech solutions in fast-paced environments.

Experience.Jobs.Title: SDE Intern
Description: Learned and implemented best practices for software development, including version control, testing, and deployment.
Gained hands-on experience with Agile methodologies and participated in daily stand-ups.
Built a real-time chat application using WebSockets and Node.js, increasing communication and collaboration among team members.
Contributed in many projects as a team member and learned to work in a collaborative environment.
Assisted in the development of a  ERP system for shipping using Angular and Node.js.

FeatureProjects.Title: Projects that I was a part of
FeatureProjects.Label: Featured Project

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Document Review
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: A collaborative document review and approval platform built to streamline workflows within organizations. It replaces manual review cycles, eliminates version confusion, and reduces delays through a centralized automated system enabling real-time collaboration, feedback tracking, and transparent approvals.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Cas Expert
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: A comprehensive Case Tracking System designed to streamline risk, fraud, and other case management processes. It enables users to report, manage, and track cases efficiently through a secure and organized workflow, ensuring timely and structured investigations across industries.

OtherProjects.Title: More personal projects

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Online Auction System
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: An online auction system that allows users to bid on items in real-time. Built with a focus on user experience and performance.

Contact.Title: Get in touch!
Contact.Content: I will be happy to receive your contact if you want to talk about new opportunities. Write me, and I will reply as soon as I see your message. Simple one-page design that features a profile letter with basic information about a person.
